note: The direct DiP XYZ to BVH export was retired because it loaded but retargeted badly on VRM avatars. Use these cached raw and SMPL outputs as the source for a real FBX or VRMA retarget/export step.

motions.prompt: A person stands idle with subtle breathing and a relaxed posture.
A person talks expressively with natural upper body movement and small hand gestures.
A person gestures with both hands while explaining something enthusiastically.
A person listens attentively, nodding slightly and keeping a calm stance.
A person looks around casually, turning the head and upper body left and right.
A person laughs happily with a quick shoulder bounce and open body language.
A person reacts with surprise, leaning back slightly and lifting their hands.
A person steps backward, turns slightly, and leaves the conversation.
A person thinks for a moment, pausing with one hand near their chin.

nextExport: Retarget SMPL motion to a VRM humanoid armature, then export FBX or VRMA. Do not use the retired direct BVH exporter.
